summary.candidate_filter: third-party ProxyIP only; Cloudflare official IP ranges excluded; IPv4 only; text/domain sources, manual allowlist and denylist supported; target exit region enforced
summary.selection_policy: single stable current IP; keep while healthy and still in target region; fail over only after consecutive validation failures
summary.ranking: lowest risk first: Cloudflare bot score, preferred exit colo, no corporateProxy, no verifiedBot, source count, lower latency; direct_https fallback is marked fallback_unverified and heavily down-ranked
